sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82005" key="periproqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπρο-θέω</orth>, <sense id="n82005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run forward and round</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0023.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:440" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.440</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0023.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.89</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
